## Axon Enterprise Appoints Two AI Veterans to Its Board

Board-level AI expertise at Axon suggests the company is building the oversight infrastructure for a deeper AI product strategy; if it translates to differentiated AI features in the public-safety vertical, it widens the competitive moat against new entrants.

- Axon added two directors with AI backgrounds to its board.
- Governance-level AI appointment signals institutional commitment to AI integration in its public-safety platform.
- No product announcement or financial target cited; this is a governance/strategic signal.
- Medium confidence; framed under surveillance_security_tech and ai_native_vertical themes.
